title: Backend Developer Vacancy at L&T Infotech International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at L&T Infotech International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Infotech International Enterprises:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech International Enterprises!
